name: CodeGen2.5 7B
license: Apache-2.0 (mono/multi variants; instruct variant is research-purposes-only)
archDisplay: Dense autoregressive transformer decoder (GPT-style, causal + infill objective)
note: 7B code model matching 15B-16B peers (StarCoder-15B, CodeGen1/2-16B) via infill sampling and Flash-attention serving.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Salesforce blog post 'CodeGen2.5: Small, but mighty' published 2023-07-06, and HF repos codegen25-7b-mono_P/multi_P/instruct_P exist. Fetched CodeGeeX2 README directly and confirmed it literally lists CodeGen2.5-7B-mono pass@1 = 33.4 (also pass@10 58.4, pass@100 82.7). Config.json confirms max_position_embeddings=2048 (2K ctx) and ~7B-scale Llama-like dense decoder architecture. License split (Apache-2.0 mono/multi, research-only instruct) confirmed via search of HF model cards.
